descriptions.description: The 15ml Circle roll-on bottle brings a soft, rounded silhouette to sample sizes. Its 13-415 neck accepts metal or plastic roller balls for perfume oils and essential oil blends. Ideal for aromatherapy brands and fragrance sampling at trade shows.

The 15ml Circle bottle with a 13-415 neck built for fine mist sprayers. Perfume and fragrance mist brands choose this shape for its clean lines. A compact spray format for discovery sets and travel sizes.
The 15ml Circle bottle with a 13-415 neck. Versatile for roll-on, spray, or cap closures. A soft, rounded silhouette ideal for aromatherapy and fragrance sampling.

A one-ounce Circle bottle with a 15-415 neck built for fine mist sprayers. Perfume, toner, and body mist brands choose this shape for its clean lines and easy-to-hold form. Compatible with standard spray collars for a polished retail look.
A one-ounce Circle bottle with a 15-415 neck. Versatile for spray or cap closures. The rounded shape fits comfortably in hand.
The 50ml Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck built for fine mist sprayers. Eau de toilette and fragrance mist brands use this for travel sizes and gift sets. The rounded shape stacks neatly on shelves.
The 50ml Circle dropper bottle with an 18-415 neck. Essential oils, perfume oils, beard oil, and concentrated blends dispense precisely. A clean format for aromatherapy and fragrance brands.
The 50ml Circle reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and open-mouth formats for fragrance and aftershave. A classic pour-over application.
The 50ml Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands choose this for a classic, decorative look. The rounded silhouette stands out on displays.
The 50ml Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers with tassel. A distinctive format for gift and luxury fragrance packaging.
The 50ml Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck for lotion pumps. Serums and light creams dispense cleanly. Skincare brands use this for travel and trial sizes.
A three-ounce Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck ready for lotion pumps. Body lotion, hand cream, and thick serum brands reach for this capacity. The rounded shape fits comfortably in hand.
A three-ounce Circle reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and concentrated fragrance formats. The rounded silhouette suits luxury positioning.
A three-ounce Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck for fine mist sprayers. Full-size perfume and body mist formats. The clean lines suit retail and gift sets.
A three-ounce Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands use this for a decorative, full-size format.
A three-ounce Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers with tassel. A distinctive format for gift and luxury fragrance packaging.
